title: Brownfield Access Review Changeset Review
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-task-slice.md`, `./access-review-modernization-api-contract.md`, `./reassignments.py`, and `./test_reassignments.py`. Work only from those files. Do not propose implementation or redesign. Review the changeset and return concise, prioritized review feedback that identifies blocking contract violations, brownfield coexistence risks, missing test coverage, and any distracting nit-level issues only if they materially affect the merge decision.

assertions.name: finds-blocking-contract-violations
assertions.description: Surfaces contract-breaking behavior and other merge-blocking correctness issues explicitly

assertions.name: preserves-brownfield-safety
assertions.description: Calls out coexistence, compatibility, rollback, or release-boundary risks instead of assuming a clean rewrite

assertions.name: checks-test-adequacy
assertions.description: Identifies missing negative-path, unauthorized-path, or unsupported-flow tests when they matter

assertions.name: prioritizes-findings
assertions.description: Orders review feedback by severity and avoids burying blockers under low-value commentary

assertions.name: stays-review-focused
assertions.description: Produces review feedback rather than implementation advice, redesign, or approval-style commentary
